nasb.text: Then she said, “I am making one small request of you; do not refuse me.” And the king said to her, “Ask, my mother, for I will not refuse you.”

esv.text: Then she said, “I have one small request to make of you; do not refuse me.” And the king said to her, “Make your request, my mother, for I will not refuse you.”

cnv.text: 拔示巴說：“我有一件小事求你，請不要拒絕我。”王對她說：“母親，你說吧，我必不會拒絕你。”

ccb.text: 拔示芭说：“我有一件小事求你，请你不要推辞。”王说：“母亲请说，我必不推辞。”
